verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Living below in this old sinful world, Hardly a comfort can afford; Striving alone to face temptations sore, Where could I go but to the Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where could I go, O where could I go? Seeking a refuge for my soul? Needing a friend to help me in the end, Where could I go but to the Lord?

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Life here is grand with friends I love so dear, Comfort I get from God's own word; Yet when I face the chilling hands of death, Where could I go but to the Lord.
